claim_bullets.bullet_text: Arrays are JavaScript's 'native' representation of lists. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.101-101)
While we have mentioned arrays briefly, we haven't had a close look at them. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.101-101)
Lists are important because they represent ordered collections of things, and ordered collections are a fundamental abstraction for making sense of reality. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.101-101)

source_record_text: Arrays are JavaScript's 'native' representation of lists.
